stocks.impact_theory: Recent news of accelerated Blackwell AI chip production ramp-up amid surging data center demand from hyperscalers like MSFT and AMZN. Economic implications: Reinforces AI infrastructure spend cycle, potentially adding $100B+ to capex in 2026. Market psychology: Renewed FOMO among retail and institutions, driving momentum trading. Historical parallels: Mirrors 2023 H100 shortage frenzy leading to 200%+ rally. Analogies: (1) Oil boom fueling energy giants in 1970s; (2) Dot-com era Cisco router dominance.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches reveal positive analyst upgrades (e.g., Goldman to PT $175); X sentiment (semantic search limit 20, latest) 75% bullish posts on production news, high engagement on #NVDA #AI. Strong buy volume post-news.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long NVDA for +10% gain in 1-2 weeks on continued AI hype; target $160.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if supply chain delays emerge, potential -5% pullback.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Overvaluation bubble burst, competition from AMD/TSMC, broader tech selloff on Fed hikes.

stocks.justification: Multiple confirming sources on production ramp, high X engagement, historical momentum precedent.

stocks.impact_theory: Report of regulatory probe into Cybertruck battery fires, leading to potential recall of 50k units. Economic implications: Hits Q2 delivery targets, margins squeezed by fixes (~$500M cost). Market psychology: Erodes confidence in EV safety leadership, triggers short attacks. Historical parallels: 2019 Model 3 suspension recall caused 15% dip. Analogies: (1) Boeing 737 MAX grounding; (2) Takata airbag recalls crippling suppliers.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web news headlines on NHTSA investigation; X keyword search ($TSLA since:2026-03-05) shows 65% negative sentiment, viral threads on fire videos with min_faves:500+.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long on dip if recall contained, rebound +12%.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Elon Musk tweet reversal, strong Q1 deliveries offset.

stocks.justification: Clear regulatory risk but Tesla history of quick resolutions tempers severity.

stocks.impact_theory: Launch of Apple Intelligence features in iOS 19.5 beta, integrating advanced on-device AI. Economic implications: Boosts upgrade cycle, services revenue +20% YoY. Market psychology: Validates AAPL in AI race, reduces 'missing AI train' fears. Historical parallels: Siri launch in 2011 sparking app ecosystem boom. Analogies: (1) iPhone debut revolutionizing mobiles; (2) Adding turbo to a sports car.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Positive coverage on beta reviews; X semantic search shows bullish hype around demos, 80% positive ratio.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long AAPL for +6% on WWDC anticipation.

stocks.justification: Proven product cycle driver, strong consumer sentiment.

stocks.impact_theory: Azure AI revenue surges 90% in Q2 preview, but antitrust scrutiny on OpenAI stake intensifies. Economic implications: Cloud dominance intact, but fines could hit $10B. Market psychology: Mixed, growth vs regulation fear. Historical parallels: Google antitrust 2010s dips. Analogies: (1) Goliath facing regulatory slingshots; (2) Speeding train hitting brakes.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings preview beats focus growth; X mixed but growth narrative prevails (60% bullish).

stocks.impact_theory: Gemini 2.0 model outperforms GPT-4 in benchmarks, but ad revenue misses on China tensions. Economic implications: AI monetization ramps, but geo-risks cap growth. Market psychology: Relief on AI catch-up. Historical parallels: Bard flop recovery in 2023. Analogies: (1) Phoenix rising from ashes; (2) Late starter winning marathon.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Benchmark news viral; X posts high positive on #Gemini, offsetting ad concerns.

stocks.justification: AI progress clear, but ad cyclicality moderate confidence.
